optional.name: members
optional.description: Array of user IDs to add as members

optional.name: groupId
optional.description: Group/organization ID, falls back as organizationId if numeric

optional.name: organizationId
optional.description: Organization to create the project under

optional.name: required_preparation_days
optional.description: Alternative to weeks; converted to weeks if weeks is null (ceil(days/7))

requestBodyExample.name: New Building Project
requestBodyExample.description: Construction of a new office building

sideEffects: Validates user is logged in and belongs to (or is admin of) the target organization
Checks organization plan subscription project limit (maxProjects quota)
Creates a Nextcloud group (e.g. 'proj-<random-hex>') with owner + members
Creates a Deck board named '{projectName} - Main Board' shared with the project group
Creates shared group folder via groupfolders API with quota from the plan
Creates private per-user folders inside each member's personal files
Creates a whiteboard file (.whiteboard) in the shared folder
Optionally creates a Talk conversation and adds all members (if Talk integration available)
Seeds default Deck cards based on project type via DeckDefaultCardsService
Shares the whiteboard file in the Talk conversation (if Talk was created)
Rolls back all created resources (group, board, folders, Talk) on any failure

details: PHP type hints enforce basic types on controller method parameters
Manual fallback parsing for request_date, desired_execution_date, required_preparation_weeks, required_preparation_days from raw request params
required_preparation_days converted to weeks if weeks not provided (ceil(days/7))
groupId used as organizationId fallback if organizationId is null and groupId is numeric string
Service layer validates org membership for owner and all members
Service layer enforces subscription plan project limits
